summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Urbanivity mobility platform - all 14 mobility modes fully functional across backend APIs and frontend dashboard. Login, routing, transit network, alerts, and mode detail features working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 422 for missing fields instead of 200 with error message
minor_issues.impact: ValidationError behavior differs from expected - returns Pydantic validation error instead of custom error message

ui_bugs.issue: Mode detail panel does not open consistently on double-click

passed_tests: Backend: All 17 API endpoints (100% success rate)
Backend: GET /api/mobility-modes/{mode}/detail works for metro, wheelchair, bicycle
Backend: GET /api/alerts returns 12 alerts covering 10 different mobility modes
Frontend: Login page with name, email, role selection redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Routing page shows all 14 mobility mode cards with time, cost, CO2, reliability, accessibility
Frontend: Routing page has 5 category filter tabs (All Modes, Active, Transit, Vehicle, Micro)
Frontend: Routing page has 4 sort options (Time, Cost, CO2, Reliability)
Frontend: Quick Comparison table displayed at bottom of routing page
Frontend: Route cards expand to show segments detail when clicked
Frontend: Transit Network map with side panel showing 7 filter tabs
Frontend: Mode bar shows all 14 modes as clickable chips with filtering
Frontend: Alerts page shows 12 alerts with proper filtering
Frontend: Shared Mobility shows 'Planned for Q3 2026' in routing
Frontend: All navigation sections working (Overview, Transit, Routing, Alerts, etc.)
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (17/17 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (1 minor UI issue)
